narrative:
Cols 67-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,301 registered voters, with 67.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.5 percentage points.
